case_title: RJ TWILEGAR VS. POWELL PLACE CITY SHARE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT POWELL PLACE CITY SHARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY TWILEGAR, RJ AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL PLACE CITY SHARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.00 SERVED APR-19-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL PLACE CITY SHARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY AND DEFENDANT. AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2016. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TWILEGAR, RJ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT POWELL PLACE CITY SHARE OWNERS ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
